text:
Created attachment 251691
port of google-earth-pro 7.3.6

It looks like my previous patch missed a few changes. I had the PLIST_SUB=LINUXBASE=${LINUXBASE} in my local directory.

I also have implemented all the suggestions.

It does pass poudriere testport, which does a make check-plist.

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
=>> Checking for staging violations... done
